tinker.name: JSON Editor
tinker.description: JSON editor with text and tree modes

zh-CN.name: JSON 编辑
zh-CN.description: JSON 编辑器，支持文本和树形模式

open.description: Open a JSON file in the editor. Same as opening a file in the UI. Call this before editing an existing file.

path.description: Absolute path to a JSON file

get.description: Get the current JSON content in the editor, validation error (if any), editor mode, file path, and unsaved-change state.

set.description: Replace the JSON content in the editor. Changes apply immediately. The content may be valid or invalid JSON. Call save afterward to write to disk.

format.description: Pretty-print the current JSON with 2-space indentation. Fails if the content is not valid JSON.

minify.description: Minify the current JSON by removing whitespace. Fails if the content is not valid JSON.

save.description: Save the current JSON content to disk. Uses the open file path by default. When no file is open, path is required.

path.description: Absolute path to save to. Required when no file is open; optional to save-as to a new path.
